what_happened: Pinned mutable version tags (@v6) in cleanup-preview-schemas.yml to full commit SHAs
why: Mutable tags like @v6 can point to updated (potentially malicious) code; pinning to a SHA gives a guaranteed immutable reference
fix_applied: Replaced all `uses: action@vX` references with `uses: action@<full-sha> # vX.Y.Z` in .github/workflows/cleanup-preview-schemas.yml
pattern_to_remember: When pinning GitHub Actions to SHAs, always append a `# vX.Y.Z` inline comment so the human-readable version is preserved alongside the immutable SHA. Format: `uses: owner/action@<40-char-sha> # vX.Y.Z`
